# Rustic array ordering/comparison helper showcase programs.
let xs = sort([4, 1, 3, 2]); xs[0] * 1000 + xs[1] * 100 + xs[2] * 10 + xs[3] => 1234
let xs = dedup([5, 2, 5, 3, 2]); len(xs) * 100 + sum(xs) => 310
let xs = dedup(sort(concat([3, 1, 3], [2, 1]))); xs[0] * 100 + xs[1] * 10 + xs[2] => 123
contains_any(dedup(sort([8, 4, 8, 2])), [4]) + find(sort([7, 1, 7]), 7) => 2
equals(sort([3, 1, 2]), dedup(sort([1, 2, 2, 3]))) => 1
starts_with(dedup(sort([4, 2, 4, 1])), [1, 2]) => 1
intersection_count(dedup(sort([4, 1, 4, 2])), [2, 4, 8]) => 2
let xs = difference(dedup(sort(concat([4, 1, 2], [4, 3]))), [2, 9]); xs[0] * 100 + xs[1] * 10 + xs[2] => 134
